productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Printed Teal Dress
description: Composition Teal blue and white printed sleeveless dress made of cotton fabric, has a square neckline, flaring pin-tucks at the midriff, a removable pink belt with loops on the sides and a half buttoned placket at the back with flower shaped buttons Fit Regular Wash care Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Do not iron on emebellishments Use warm iron Remove all detatchable accessories before washing or ironing gini and jony's palm tree line have come up with this pretty dress, perfect for your little princess. Designed for both style and comfort, dress her up and watch her steal the show everywhere she goes!
